gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor points to the colorful blocks on the screen and smiles while inviting learners to look closely.
a person leans slightly forward, tilts head with curiosity, and gestures with both hands as if counting.
a tutor moves one hand in a sweeping motion, showing three groups, while nodding to emphasize the blocks.
a person raises both arms, counting off by tapping each arm as they say four plus four plus four.
a tutor steps back, opens arms wide, and gestures toward imaginary groups while energizing the learners.
a person bends slightly forward, encourages with hand motions as if combining groups, and invites counting aloud.
a tutor claps hands together cheerfully, nodding and smiling to celebrate the learners’ understanding of multiplication.
a person raises both hands in a friendly wave and gestures forward as if encouraging ongoing practice and exploration.
